response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK c1
ATTR c1 : varchar : PK
ATTR c2 : varchar
ATTR c3 : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt_code : varchar
ATTR airplane_registration : varchar
ATTR airline_code : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK flight_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY SeatAssignment
PK flight_code, passenger_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : FK
ATTR seat : varchar

REL Passenger -> SeatAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=passenger_code
REL Flight -> SeatAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_code
REL FlightStatus -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 1..N : FK=status_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration
REL Flight -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1..N : FK=crew_code
